'''Durafly''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] technologies corporation. They manufactured [[Ion engine/Legends|sublight]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Hyperdrive|drives]]. The [[GX1 short hauler]] ''[[Long Shot]]'' utilized a paired set of Durafly sublight/hyperdrive engines.

{{Company-stub}}
